package.name: mserve_joystick
package.description:
Game controller teleop. Consumes sensor_msgs/Joy (published by the `joy` package's joy_node from the raw USB gamepad device) and turns it into /cmd_vel plus a handful of button actions (drivechain connect, display info screen, speed/angular scale adjustment). A plain rclcpp::Node, not lifecycle-managed — same reasoning as mserve_display (no hardware "connect" step of its own; joy_node owns the actual device).
Two-file config split (both under interfaces/config/, both always loaded onto this node): joystick_params.yaml holds one controller_profiles entry per controller model, mapping that controller's raw sensor_msgs/Joy axes[]/buttons[] indices to semantic names; mserve_params.yaml's mserve_joystick section picks which profile to use (controller_profile) and maps those semantic names to actions plus tuning parameters — the latter doesn't need touching when only the controller hardware changes.
